UpdateIpAddressGroup.ipSetId: The ID of the IP address group
UpdateIpAddressGroup.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
UpdateIpAddressGroup.name: The name of the IP address group
UpdateIpAddressGroup.description: The description of the IP address group
